top_signals.title: Bonds Rally Ahead of Fed as Oil Extends Losing Run: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Bonds climbed as oil headed for its longest losing streak in 10 months, with investors awaiting the Federal Reserve’s policy decision for further clues on the outlook for global interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
